transcript: I Wish people love one another I wish that the world could be more understanding that is the only way that we can put aside our differences and work together as one human family I wish everyone in the world can feel loved and healthy. I was just thinking that I don't have to be afraid because I'm just covered with God. My wish for the world is to be full of love. I wish for a world where there is no discrimination.
